code:
import io
import string

mut s = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(v)
  s = v
when None
  s = ""
end

mut n_str = ""
match io.read_line()
when Some(v)
  n_str = v
when None
  n_str = "0"
end

mut n = 0
match string.parse_int(n_str)
when Some(v)
  n = v
when None
  n = 0
end

mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  result = "#{result}#{s}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
